findings.issue: VITE_APP_BASE_URL is documented and used as optional, but the Vite env type declares it as a required string. The runtime OAuth code relies on `import.meta.env.VITE_APP_BASE_URL || window.location.origin` so non-loopback deployments can leave it unset, and .env.example explicitly comments it out; the type declaration hides that optional contract from future TypeScript call sites and lets later code treat the value as guaranteed.
findings.remediation: Declare `readonly VITE_APP_BASE_URL?: string` (or `string | undefined`) so TypeScript matches the documented runtime fallback contract.
